title: Digital Employees
subtitle: Manage and add your digital employee team

createDigitalEmployee.title: Create digital employee
createDigitalEmployee.namePlaceholder: Give your digital employee a name
createDigitalEmployee.vibePlaceholder: One line that captures this employee’s core tone
createDigitalEmployee.soulPlaceholder:
# Persona (SOUL.md)

## Identity & memory
- **Role**: [Your role title]
- **Personality**: [One or two sentences]
- **Memory**: Track conversation context and constraints; stay consistent.

## Rules
- Ask clarifying questions before acting when uncertain.
- Do not fabricate facts; cite sources or request missing data.

## Communication
- Clear, structured answers; use bullets when helpful.
- Respect the user; propose better options when appropriate.
createDigitalEmployee.agentsPlaceholder:
# Agent instructions (AGENTS.md)

## Mission
- [One sentence: what this agent optimizes for]

## Deliverables
- Docs, code, analysis, plans—tailor to your workflow.

## Workflow
1. Align on goals and constraints
2. Propose a plan and iterate if needed
3. Execute, self-check, and deliver

## Safety & boundaries
- Do not upload or share unapproved sensitive data.
- Confirm before external systems or paid actions.
createDigitalEmployee.skillsHint: Leave empty to allow all skills. If you pick skills below, only those will be available after provision.
createDigitalEmployee.skillSearchPlaceholder: Search the skill marketplace and installed skills…
createDigitalEmployee.skillsEmpty: No installed skills found. Open the Skills page or type a keyword to search the marketplace.

noMyEmployeesDesc: Add employees from the digital employee library to get started

removeDialog.title: Remove digital employee?
removeDialog.intro: This will remove the linked OpenClaw Agent from your local config and delete its workspace directory.
removeDialog.bulletConfig: Remove the Agent from OpenClaw configuration
removeDialog.bulletWorkspace: Delete its workspace directory (persona and workspace Markdown, etc.)
removeDialog.bulletRuntime: May affect runtime sessions or data tied to this Agent

errors.missingLinkedAgent: This employee is not linked to an OpenClaw Agent, so the app cannot delete config or workspace automatically. Use Channels, Settings, or your local OpenClaw folder to clean up, then handle the list entry.
errors.addMustRemoveFirst: This employee is already in your list. Remove them first before adding again.
errors.agentNotInSnapshot: The linked Agent ID is missing from the current OpenClaw list. Try refreshing; if it persists, check your local OpenClaw configuration.
